memberdef.name: FFT_getset
FFTObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "spectral.FFT", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(FFTObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)FFTObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create a 1-D FFT instance.\n", .tp_methods = FFTObj_methods, .tp_getset = FFT_getset, .tp_new = FFTObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)FFTObj_init, }
